column1:
If Charles had had enough money, he'd have bought CD.

1. Did Charles have enough money?

2. Did he buy the CD?

Cilla would have called Andrea if she'd taken her mobile with her.

1. Did Cilla call Andrea? 

2. Did she take her mobile with her?

If we hadn't been late, we'd have seen the start of the film. 

1. Were they late?

2. Did they see the start of the film.

Paul wouldn't have made a mistake If he'd listened to Lee. 

1. Did Paul make a mistake? 

2. Did Paul listen to Lee?

Jo wouldn't have gone to the party if she hadn't been invited.

1. Did Jo go to the party? 

2. Was Jo invented to the party?

Tom would have forgotten his keys if Lisa hadn't reminded him. 

1. Did Tom forget his keys? 

2. Did Lisa remind him about his keys?
